default.title: Teamem Cloud
default.description: Managed Teamem setup for humans and their coding agents.

landing.title: Teamem Cloud | Managed team memory
landing.description: Create a hosted Teamem Space for Claude Code teams and keep claims, briefings, decisions, discussions, and Space Rules in sync without self-hosting.

login.title: Sign in to Teamem Cloud
login.description: Sign in to Teamem Cloud with OAuth while keeping runtime Teamem member identity separate from your web account.

dashboard.title: Teamem Cloud Dashboard
dashboard.description: Create and manage your Teamem Cloud Space, setup command, hosted runtime URL, and room code.

hero.eyebrow: Managed Teamem server for Claude Code teams
hero.title: Teamem Cloud
hero.tagline: Teamem is team memory for humans and their coding agents.
hero.description: Create a hosted Teamem Space, copy the setup command, and keep using the current Claude Code plugin, bridge, git hooks, room codes, claims, briefings, decisions, discussions, and Space Rules without running the shared server yourself.

setup.label: Teamem Cloud setup path
setup.title: Managed-server path
setup.description: Cloud provisions the hosted runtime. Your team still joins through the existing local Teamem setup flow.
steps: Log in and explicitly create one free managed Space.
Copy the hosted server URL, room code, and setup command.
Run the normal CLI/plugin onboarding, then launch Claude Code.
setup.note: Self-hosting remains available for teams that want to operate their own Teamem server. Cloud is the fastest managed path.

rows.label: Shared work context
rows.text: Briefings load at session start or resume so Claude Code gets the current plan, active claims, recent decisions, risks, and progress without repeating a full context fetch before every edit.

rows.label: Scope coordination
rows.text: File and module claims make it clear who is changing what, then release through the existing git handoff flow.

rows.label: Durable decisions
rows.text: Decisions, gotchas, discussions, and Space Rules keep team memory outside one local chat transcript.

rows.label: Safer conflict avoidance
rows.text: Teamem surfaces competing work early so teammates can avoid duplicate Claude Code edits and late merge surprises.

LoginPage.title: Sign in
LoginPage.description: Use an OAuth account to access the Cloud dashboard. Runtime Teamem member identity is still chosen later in the local setup flow.
LoginPage.authError: We could not complete sign-in. Try again with GitHub or Google.

DashboardPage.title: Dashboard
DashboardPage.description: You are signed in. This view creates and displays your Teamem Cloud Space while keeping web account identity separate from runtime member identity.

account.title: Account
account.text: OAuth session is active for dashboard access. Runtime Teamem member identity is configured later in the local CLI/plugin setup.

setup.title: Set up a teammate
setup.bootstrapperPrefix: Install the bootstrapper first if needed:
setup.setupCommandUnavailable: Setup command will appear when runtime provisioning finishes.
setup.launchPrefix: After setup, install the Teamem-owned launcher shim with
setup.launchSuffix: . It does not edit shell startup files; add the printed PATH line yourself, then run claude. Interactive
setup.verifyPrefix: prompts every launch; use claude --teamem or claude --pure for explicit choices. Non-interactive claude defaults pure. Teamem launches block with a repair hint when setup or runtime readiness is missing. Verify from Claude with
setup.unavailable: Active setup details are unavailable while this Space is not active.

roomCode.title: Room code
roomCode.description: Rotate the invite code for this Space.
roomCode.unavailable: Room-code rotation will be available when runtime provisioning finishes.

trial.label: Trial ends
trial.runtimeUnavailable: Runtime status is unavailable. Setup, room-code, and usage controls are hidden until Teamem can verify this Space live.

delete.title: Delete Space
delete.description: Soft-delete this runtime Space and mark it deleted only after the runtime confirms deletion.
delete.confirmLabel: I understand this will disable active setup for this Space.
delete.unavailable: Delete is available after runtime provisioning finishes.

quota.title: Free trial
quota.blocked: This account already has an active Free trial Space, so creating another Free trial Space is blocked by the control plane.
quota.consumedText: This account already used its one-time free trial grant. No active Space remains on the dashboard.

retry.title: Retry provisioning
retry.description: Teamem kept this Space request reserved after an uncertain runtime response. Retry uses the same Space request and idempotency key.

create.title: Create Free trial Space
create.description: Name the Space before provisioning starts.

create.created: Your Free trial Space is active.
create.quota: This account already has an active Free trial Space.
create.trialUsed: This account already used its one-time free trial grant.
create.displayName: Enter a Space display name before creating the Space.
create.reconcile: Runtime provisioning did not return a confirmed result. Free quota remains reserved while Teamem retries with the same Space request.
create.runtimeFailed: Runtime provisioning failed with a confirmed terminal result. Try creating the Space again.

rotate.missing: No active Space was found for this account.
rotate.unavailable: Runtime details are not ready for this Space.
rotate.reconcile: Runtime rotated the room code, but dashboard metadata could not be fully saved.
rotate.failed: Room-code rotation failed. The current code was not changed.

delete.success: Space deleted. This account's one-time free trial remains consumed.
delete.missing: No active Space was found for this account.
delete.unavailable: Runtime details are not ready for this Space.
delete.reconcile: Runtime deletion may have completed, but the dashboard could not fully save the result.
delete.failed: Runtime deletion failed. Free quota remains reserved for this Space.
